methods.summary: Calculate fillet between two coplanar 3d lines

returns.doc: tuple(error code, first line, second line, calculated fillet)

methods.name: Calculate(line1: Line3D, line2: Line3D) -> tuple[eFilletErrorCode, Arc3D]
methods.signature: Calculate(line1: Line3D, line2: Line3D) -> tuple[eFilletErrorCode, Arc3D]
methods.summary: Calculate fillet between two parallel non collinear 3d lines. The end point of the first line must lie on the same plane as start point of the second line and plane is perpendicular to both lines.
methods.remarks: Calculate fillet between two parallel non collinear 3d lines. The end point of the first line must lie on the same plane as start point of the second line and plane is perpendicular to both lines.

methods.name: Calculate( line1: Line3D, endPoint: eLinePointIdentification, polyline: Polyline3D, startLineIndex: int, endLineIndex: int, radius: float, ) -> tuple[eFilletErrorCode, Line3D, Line3D, Arc3D]
methods.signature: Calculate( line1: Line3D, endPoint: eLinePointIdentification, polyline: Polyline3D, startLineIndex: int, endLineIndex: int, radius: float, ) -> tuple[eFilletErrorCode, Line3D, Line3D, Arc3D]
methods.summary: Calculate fillet between line1 and line2. Line2 is created as line between end point of line1 (by parameter "endPoint") and point from polyline (limited with "startPointIndex" and "endPointIndex")
methods.remarks: Calculate fillet between line1 and line2. Line2 is created as line between end point of line1 (by parameter "endPoint") and point from polyline (limited with "startPointIndex" and "endPointIndex")

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: Sign for line2 (from where point of line1 should be start line2)

params.name: polyline
params.doc: Polyline (buffer of end points for line2)

returns.doc: tuple(error code, Line 1 for fillet, Line 2 from fillet calculation, Calculated fillet)
